description: You are an M&E Analyst at Sierra Leone's National Reproductive Health Programme. The programme director has requested a national ANC (Antenatal Care) coverage analysis for the 2023 annual review. Using DHIS2 at http://localhost:8080 (login: admin / district), create a pivot table showing ANC 1st visit attendance and ANC 4th visit attendance for each district in Sierra Leone, broken down by quarter for 2023. Save this pivot table as a favorite named 'National ANC Coverage Districts 2023' and export the data to /home/ga/Downloads/. Document which districts had ANC 4th visit counts that were less than half (50%) of ANC 1st visit counts in 2023, along with your overall assessment of national ANC coverage quality, in a text file at /home/ga/Desktop/anc_analysis_notes.txt.

metadata.task_focus: maternal health analytics and data interpretation
